raw_text:
```json
{
  "claims": [
    "California imported 15,477,000 barrels of crude oil from Russia in 2021 according to the Energy Information Agency.",
    "In-state production of oil in California has fallen nearly 20% since 2018.",
    "California has no inter-state pipelines that carry crude oil from other lower-48 states.",
    "There are over 1,000 permits for new oil production wells from in-state producers currently pending with CalGEM.",
    "Production from existing pending oil permits could supplant all Russian oil imports.",
    "Gas prices in Southern California recently hit a high of $6.15 per gallon.",
    "The average price for a gallon of gas in California is $4.79, compared to $3.36 last year."
  ]
}
```
